summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merges, fix PRs, or low-signal closes are planned because this job disables merge/fix/raise_pr and low-signal closeout. Validator-marked security-sensitive refs #77804 and #81829 are quarantined with exact-ref route_security actions only; unrelated open PRs remain non-mutating keep_independent classifications.
